title: Filipino Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful stir-fry dish made with garlic and your choice of protein.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and stir-fry until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the stir-fry sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the vegetables over the cooked rice and top with cooked shrimp.
Garnish with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of patis, if desired.
